name: illo
description: CLI-native prompt notepad sidebar for Claude Code (and any HITL agent framework). Compose deliberately, send to the Claude pane via tmux without auto-pressing Enter.

warnIntervalSeconds.title: Re-warn interval (seconds)
warnIntervalSeconds.description: Seconds between gentle re-warn animations on a still-unacknowledged item. 0 disables re-warn.

daemonPort.title: Daemon port
daemonPort.description: Localhost port the daemon and sidebar UI share.

autoOpenSidebar.title: Auto-open sidebar on session start
autoOpenSidebar.description: Open the sidebar automatically on session start. With the TUI default, this only auto-spawns inside tmux or when ILLO_SIDEBAR_AUTO_TERMINAL is set; for the browser fallback, see /illo-web.

browserCommand.title: Browser command (for /illo-web)
browserCommand.description: Browser launcher used by /illo-web only (e.g. 'google-chrome', 'chromium', 'firefox'). Empty = autodetect.

pushProvider.title: Mobile push provider
pushProvider.description: Mobile push provider: 'ntfy', 'pushover', or 'off'. DISABLED BY DEFAULT — see docs/push.md to opt in.

pushNtfyTopic.title: ntfy topic name
pushNtfyTopic.description: ntfy.sh topic name (only used if pushProvider=ntfy).

pushAfkThresholdSeconds.title: AFK threshold (seconds)
pushAfkThresholdSeconds.description: Only mobile-push items pending this long without focus. Default: 120 seconds.
